trade.summary: Solid bilateral trade relationship. Switzerland exports pharmaceuticals, chemicals, and machinery to Spain. Spain exports food products, vehicles, and tourism services. Both benefit from Schengen-area mobility and close European ties.

diplomatic.summary: Friendly relations underpinned by a large Swiss expatriate community in Spain and significant Spanish worker presence in Switzerland historically. Cooperation through Schengen and bilateral EU-Switzerland frameworks. No significant political disputes.

military.summary: No formal military alliance due to Swiss neutrality. Switzerland is not a NATO member; Spain is. Limited security dialogue at European level.

financial.summary: Swiss banks and financial institutions have significant operations in Spain. Spanish companies have invested in Switzerland. Bilateral FDI stock is moderate.

energy.summary: Limited direct energy trade. Switzerland and Spain both participate in European energy networks. Spain exports some renewable energy via interconnectors.

scientific.summary: Active collaboration in pharmaceuticals and biomedical research. Swiss and Spanish universities cooperate via EU Horizon programs. Joint research publications growing steadily.
